Fig. 2: Latent Diffusion Process in Training and Inference. (a) In training, the VAE encoder produces latent z0, which is perturbed to zt by adding noise. A UNet is trained to predict the noise, following the Noise-Prediction Training Objective. (b) In inference, the reverse denoising process transforms sampled noise zT back to z0, which is decoded to generate the target sequence, as described in Generation.
